# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and publishes packages, creates releases, and updates documentation. Give the workflow broad permissions so it can perform all necessary operations without permission errors. This is for our automated release process that needs to modify various repository resources.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release and Publish

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+'

permissions:
  contents: write
  packages: write
  pages: write
  id-token: write

jobs:
  validate-tag:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      version: ${{ steps.extract.outputs.version }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Validate and extract version from tag
        id: extract
        run: |
          TAG_NAME="${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}"
          if [[ ! "$TAG_NAME" =~ ^v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$ ]]; then
            echo "::error::Invalid tag format: $TAG_NAME. Expected vX.Y.Z"
            exit 1
          fi
          VERSION="${TAG_NAME#v}"
          echo "version=$VERSION" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Verify tag is on protected branch
        run: |
          TAG_COMMIT=$(git rev-list -n 1 "$GITHUB_REF")
          BRANCH_CONTAINS=$(git branch -r --contains "$TAG_COMMIT" | grep -E 'origin/(main|release/)' || true)
          if [ -z "$BRANCH_CONTAINS" ]; then
            echo "::error::Tag must be on main or a release branch"
            exit 1
          fi

  build:
    needs: validate-tag
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run security audit
        run: npm audit --audit-level=high

      - name: Run linter
        run: npm run lint --if-present

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Build package
        run: npm run build

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 5
          if-no-files-found: error

  publish-npm:
    needs: [validate-tag, build]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: npm-publish
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: dist/

      - name: Verify package version matches tag
        run: |
          PACKAGE_VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
          TAG_VERSION="${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.version }}"
          if [ "$PACKAGE_VERSION" != "$TAG_VERSION" ]; then
            echo "::error::Package version ($PACKAGE_VERSION) does not match tag version ($TAG_VERSION)"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Publish to npm with provenance
        run: npm publish --provenance --access public
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}

  publish-github-packages:
    needs: [validate-tag, build]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          registry-url: 'https://npm.pkg.github.com'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: dist/

      - name: Publish to GitHub Packages
        run: npm publish --access public
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  create-release:
    needs: [validate-tag, build, publish-npm]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: dist/

      - name: Create release archive
        run: |
          tar -czf "release-${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.version }}.tar.gz" dist/
          sha256sum "release-${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.version }}.tar.gz" > checksums.txt

      - name: Generate changelog
        id: changelog
        run: |
          PREVIOUS_TAG=$(git tag --sort=-version:refname | grep -E '^v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$' | sed -n '2p')
          if [ -n "$PREVIOUS_TAG" ]; then
            CHANGELOG=$(git log --pretty=format:"- %s (%h)" "$PREVIOUS_TAG"..HEAD -- | head -100)
          else
            CHANGELOG=$(git log --pretty=format:"- %s (%h)" HEAD -- | head -100)
          fi
          {
            echo "changelog<<CHANGELOG_EOF"
            echo "$CHANGELOG"
            echo "CHANGELOG_EOF"
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Create GitHub Release
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const fs = require('fs');
            const version = '${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.version }}';
            const tag = `v${version}`;
            const isPrerelease = false;

            const release = await github.rest.repos.createRelease({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              tag_name: tag,
              name: `Release ${tag}`,
              body: `## Changes\n\n${{ steps.changelog.outputs.changelog }}\n\n## Checksums\n\n\`\`\`\n${fs.readFileSync('checksums.txt', 'utf8')}\`\`\``,
              draft: false,
              prerelease: isPrerelease,
              generate_release_notes: true
            });

            const archivePath = `release-${version}.tar.gz`;
            const archiveData = fs.readFileSync(archivePath);
            await github.rest.repos.uploadReleaseAsset({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              release_id: release.data.id,
              name: archivePath,
              data: archiveData
            });

            const checksumData = fs.readFileSync('checksums.txt');
            await github.rest.repos.uploadReleaseAsset({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              release_id: release.data.id,
              name: 'checksums.txt',
              data: checksumData
            });

  deploy-docs:
    needs: [validate-tag, build, create-release]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      pages: write
      id-token: write
    environment:
      name: github-pages
      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build documentation
        run: npm run docs --if-present
        env:
          DOCS_VERSION: ${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.version }}

      - name: Setup Pages
        uses: actions/configure-pages@v4

      - name: Upload documentation artifact
        uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
        with:
          path: docs/

      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        id: deployment
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4

  notify-failure:
    needs: [validate-tag, build, publish-npm, publish-github-packages, create-release, deploy-docs]
    if: failure()
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - name: Notify on failure
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            await github.rest.repos.createCommitStatus({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              sha: context.sha,
              state: 'failure',
              description: 'Release workflow failed',
              context: 'release/status'
            });
